things.name: Akodessewa Fetish Market
things.description: The world's largest voodoo market with animal skulls, dried herbs and potions

things.name: Grand Marche des Femmes
things.description: Lome's main market run entirely by women - fabrics, food and crafts

things.name: Lome Cathedral
things.description: Sacred Heart Cathedral - a striking German colonial Gothic church

things.name: Kpalime
things.description: Craft centre in a lush mountain setting with butterfly sanctuary and waterfalls

things.name: Atlantic Beach Promenade
things.description: Lome's seaside promenade stretching along the Gulf of Guinea

things.name: National Museum of Togo
things.description: Traditional Togolese artefacts, crafts and ethnographic collections

things.name: German Colonial Architecture
things.description: Walking tour of Lome's colonial-era buildings - the only West African capital bordering the sea

things.name: Togoville
things.description: Village on Lake Togo where Germany signed its colonial treaty - papal visit site

things.name: Atakpame
things.description: Colonial hill town with the Agou mountain views and waterfalls

things.name: Palimé Craft Village
things.description: Traditional batik fabric dyeing, wood carving and local artisans at work
